text.title: chunking-production-service Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for chunking-production-service. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: ChunkingService MUST accept ChunkingConfig (strategy, chunk_size, overlap, min_chunk_size) and an optional embedding_func. It MUST raise ValueError immediately when strategy=SEMANTIC and embedding_func is None, rather than deferring the error to chunk time. The fallback path MUST be reached only via the exception handler, never as a default code path, and MUST log the exception before returning fallback chunks.
rule.rationale: Failing fast on missing embedding_func surfaces configuration errors at service construction time rather than mid-batch. Logging the exception before fallback ensures that silent word-split output is traceable in monitoring; without the log, operators cannot distinguish fallback chunks from successful RecursiveChunker output.
